title: Stripe webhook delivery latency spike
summary: Stripe-side webhook delivery to /webhooks/stripe slowed from ~120ms p95 to ~6.4s p95 between 09:08 and 09:51 UTC. Backlog drained after Stripe rolled back a delivery-pipeline deploy on their side. No retries required — Stripe redelivered automatically.
impact: Webhook events for ~38k charges arrived 5–9s late during the window. Downstream reconciliation jobs ran on schedule; no customer-visible impact.

timeline.author: alertmanager
timeline.message: webhook-delivery-latency alert fired on payments-api (threshold p95 1s, observed p95 6.4s).

timeline.author: @marco
timeline.message: Acknowledged. Endpoint is healthy on our side (response p95 14ms). Suspect upstream.

timeline.author: @marco
timeline.message: Stripe status page updated: 'Investigating elevated webhook delivery latency.' Standing by — nothing to fix on our end.

timeline.author: @marco
timeline.message: Stripe deployed a fix; webhook delivery p95 back to ~140ms. Backlog clearing.

timeline.author: @marco
timeline.message: Backlog drained. Recon jobs verified zero gap. Marking resolved.
